events.name: New England Patriots at Jacksonville Jaguars

headlines.description: — The Jacksonville Jaguars didn't show any quit this week after falling behind early on Sunday against the New England Patriots.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bigsby scores 2 TDs as Jaguars show fight in 32-16 win over Patriots in London

headlines.description: — The Seattle Seahawks had something to prove on defense after three dismal performances.
headlines.shortLinkText: Smith throws 2 TD passes, Seahawks defense dominates in a 34-14 win over the Falcons

headlines.description: — It didn’t take Amari Cooper long to get the hang of Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills' offense — even when the quarterback was changing plays at the line of scrimmage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cooper scores in his Bills debut and Allen shakes off a sluggish start in 34-10 rout of Titans

headlines.description: — As Deshaun Watson tucked the ball under his arm and collapsed without being touched, some Browns fans cheered.
headlines.shortLinkText: Browns lose QB Deshaun Watson to Achilles tendon injury as they fall 21-14 to the Bengals

events.name: Houston Texans at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Brandon McManus insisted he hadn't planned to do a “Lambeau leap” if he made a winning field goal in his Green Bay Packers debut.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brandon McManus' field goal on the final play gives Packers a 24-22 victory over Texans

headlines.description: — Anthony Richardson didn’t even bother to look at the stats on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: QB Richardson's late scoring drives send Colts past Dolphins 16-10

headlines.description: — The Detroit Lions became division champions for the first time in 30 years late last season with a clinching win at Minnesota. They departed this...
headlines.shortLinkText: Lions top previously unbeaten Vikings 31-29 on late FG to cap NFC North thriller

events.name: Philadelphia Eagles at New York Giants

headlines.description: — Coming into MetLife Stadium to face the New York Giants for the first time as a member of the Philadelphia Eagles, Saquon Barkley said he saw fans burning his old Giants jersey.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barkley rushes for 176 yards and a TD in a memorable return as the Eagles blitz the Giants 28-3

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Los Angeles Rams

headlines.description: — The Los Angeles Rams' defense hasn't been good in its first season after Aaron Donald's retirement. Forcing turnovers has been a particular area of struggle.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rams force 4 turnovers and hold off Raiders 20-15 after QB Aidan O'Connell gets injured

headlines.description: — Jayden Daniels' health was the first thing on Marcus Mariota's mind when he went into the game for the injured rookie quarterback. Then he...
headlines.shortLinkText: Commanders lose Jayden Daniels to a rib injury in a 40-7 romp over the Panthers

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at San Francisco 49ers
New York Jets at Pittsburgh Steelers

headlines.description: — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come.
headlines.shortLinkText: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
